diagrams.title: Key Types Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy from Super Key to Primary Key
elements: Foreign Key (separate box pointing to other table)
diagrams.purpose: Understand that Primary Key is a minimal Candidate Key, which is a minimal Super Key

diagrams.title: Relational Model Components
diagrams.description: Structure of a relation with all components labeled
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how data is organized in relational databases

diagrams.title: Referential Integrity Example
diagrams.description: Shows two tables with Primary Key-Foreign Key relationship
elements: Order table with FK=CustID referencing Customer
diagrams.purpose: Understand how tables are linked and referential integrity works
